        " src="https://cdn5.lolalytics.com/skill68/renekton_r.webp" width="30" height="30" alt="Renekton R Skill" data-id="" q:key="2T_0" q:id="4c"><!--/qv--><div class="right-[-14px] top-[-12px] w-[12px] text-[12px] relative bg-black text-center text-[#cccccc]">R</div></div><!--/qv--></span><q:template q:slot="tip" hidden aria-hidden="true"><div q:slot="tip" q:id="4d">Loading...</div></q:template><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div><!--/qv--></div></div><!--qv q:key=1z_8--><!--qv q:id=4e q:key=D0MN:1z_5--><p class="lolx-links px-2 text-justify text-[14px] leading-normal text-white sm:px-0" q:key="QW_3"><span><a href=/lol/renekton/build/>Renekton</a> top has a 49.22% win rate in Emerald+ on Patch 16.11</span><span q:key="QW_0"> coming in at rank 90 of 108 and graded C- Tier on the <a href="/lol/tierlist/">LoL Tierlist</a></span>. <span q:key="QW_1">Renekton top is a strong counter to <a href="/lol/renekton/vs/gragas/build/?lane=top&vslane=top">Gragas</a>, <a href="/lol/renekton/vs/volibear/build/?lane=top&vslane=top">Volibear</a> & <a href="/lol/renekton/vs/camille/build/?lane=top&vslane=top">Camille</a> while Renekton is countered most by <a href="/lol/renekton/vs/singed/build/?lane=top&vslane=top">Singed</a>, <a href="/lol/renekton/vs/ornn/build/?lane=top&vslane=top">Ornn</a> & <a href="/lol/renekton/vs/trundle/build/?lane=top&vslane=top">Trundle</a>.</span> <span q:key="QW_2">The best Renekton players have a 54.2% win rate with an average rank of Grandmaster on the <a href="/lol/renekton/leaderboard/">Renekton Leaderboard</a>. Below is a detailed breakdown of the Renekton build, runes & counters.</span></p><!--/qv--><div class="mt-4"><!--qv q:id=4f q:key=jLTR:1z_6--><!--qv q:key=Eq_4--><div class="flex justify-around border border-[#333333] p-2 text-center"><div><div class="mb-1 font-bold"><!--t=4g-->49.22<!---->%</div><div class="text-xs text-[#bbbbbb]">Win Rate</div></div><!--qv q:key=Eq_2--><div><div class="mb-1 font-bold"><!--t=4h-->0.02<!---->%</div><div class="text-xs text-[#bbbbbb]">WR Delta<!--qv q:id=4i q:key=50dk:Eq_0--><!--qv q:id=4j q:key=Bi0X:le_0--><span on:mouseover="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_De0yP0kzg3Y[0]" on:mouseleave="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_cN7QDqkt2jI[1]" on:focus="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_nieGBFxF4jY[0]" on:blur="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_5AURFqnPAjw[1]" q:key="tW_3" q:id="4k"><!--qv q:s q:sref=4j q:key=--><div class="relative top-[-7px] ml-0.5 inline-block" q:id="4l"><div class="flex h-[12px] w-[12px] cursor-help items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-[#ebebeb] text-center text-[11px] font-bold text-black">?</div></div><!--/qv--></span><q:template q:slot="tip" hidden aria-hidden="true"><div q:slot="tip" class="min-w-[300px] p-2 text-xs text-[#a09b8c]" q:id="4m">Champion win rate and win rate delta. The win rate delta is the difference between the win rate using individual player tiers (LoLalytics chosen method) vs the win rate derived from using a game averaged tier (simpler method used by some other websites). LoLalytics data is based upon individual player tiers which includes all games by all players of a given bracket and doesn't include games from players outside the chosen bracket. LoLalytics chosen method provides the most accurate picture of how people of a given tier bracket are performing.</div></q:template><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><div><div class="mb-1 font-bold"><!--t=4n-->49.2<!---->%</div><div class="text-xs text-[#bbbbbb]">Game Avg WR<!--qv q:id=4o q:key=50dk:Eq_1--><!--qv q:id=4p q:key=Bi0X:le_0--><span on:mouseover="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_De0yP0kzg3Y[0]" on:mouseleave="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_cN7QDqkt2jI[1]" on:focus="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_nieGBFxF4jY[0]" on:blur="q-B9SUrnRF.js#s_5AURFqnPAjw[1]" q:key="tW_3" q:id="4q"><!--qv q:s q:sref=4p q:key=--><div class="relative top-[-7px] ml-0.5 inline-block" q:id="4r"><div class="flex h-[12px] w-[12px] cursor-help items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-[#ebebeb] text-center text-[11px] font-bold text-black">?</div></div><!--/qv--></span><q:template q:slot="tip" hidden aria-hidden="true"><div q:slot="tip" class="min-w-[300px] p-2 text-xs text-[#a09b8c]" q:id="4s">Champion win rate and win rate delta. The win rate delta is the difference between the win rate using individual player tiers (LoLalytics chosen method) vs the win rate derived from using a game averaged tier (simpler method used by some other websites). LoLalytics data is based upon individual player tiers which includes all games by all players of a given bracket and doesn't include games from players outside the chosen bracket. LoLalytics chosen method provides the most accurate picture of how people of a given tier bracket are performing.</div></q:template><!--/qv--><!--/qv--></div></div><!--/qv--><div><div class="mb-1
